title: draba daurica
intro: Draba daurica, also known as the Daurian whitlow grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Draba daurica include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its use in treating digestive problems. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into a tea or powder, which can be used to treat various ailments, and it is also used in some modern herbal supplements.
